lede: A distributed studio of senior people. No juniors, no handoffs, no house style — just the sharpest answer to one question, asked of every project.

thesis.body: Most branding is camouflage: safe colours, borrowed language, a logo built to upset no one and remembered by no one. We build the opposite — brands that choose to be seen, and are chosen because of it. That is the whole studio in one line.

disciplines.name: Strategy
disciplines.text: The one true thing no competitor can copy. A few weeks of interviews and audits to find it, then everything else gets built on top.

disciplines.name: Positioning
disciplines.text: One sentence about who you are for and why you are the obvious choice, sharpened until only you can say it.

disciplines.name: Identity
disciplines.text: Name, mark, type, colour, voice and motion, built into one system people recognise before they finish reading it.

disciplines.name: Naming
disciplines.text: A name that carries the strategy and travels: legally clear, easy to say, hard to forget.

where: Distributed across six timezones. We work wherever the project takes us, on senior people start to finish.

closing.note: That is the only test that matters here. If the work would not carry our own name, it does not ship. Tell us what you are building.
